# Trading Tazos Game — llms.txt

> A free browser-based collectible skill game with 150 planned Season 1 tazos across 3 original franchises, all 150 currently published.
> Built with Next.js 16, Three.js, Tailwind CSS.
> Play at https://tradingtazosgame.com

## What is this?
Trading Tazos Game (TTG) is an independent fictional digital tazo game. Players collect tazos, open digital bags, build decks, and battle in a physics-driven 3D arena. Minimon, Dracobell, and Cybermon are original fictional IPs. TTG is NOT affiliated with any third-party toy, anime, game or collectible brand.

## Quick Links
- Home: https://tradingtazosgame.com
- How to Play: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=how-to-play
- Collections: https://tradingtazosgame.com/collections/minimon | dracobell | cybermon
- Tazo Catalog: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=tazos
- Leaderboard: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=leaderboard
- Download: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=download
- FAQ: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=faq
- Shop: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=shop (bag preview)
- Privacy: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=privacy
- Terms: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=terms
- Cookies: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=cookies
- Contact: https://tradingtazosgame.com/?page=contact
- Disclaimer: https://tradingtazosgame.com/disclaimer
- Healthcheck: https://tradingtazosgame.com/api/health
- GitHub: https://github.com/smouj/Trading-Tazos-Game

## Project
- **Name**: Trading Tazos Game (TTG)
- **Status**: Open Beta (v0.6.2)
- **Stack**: Next.js 16 / TypeScript / Prisma / SQLite / Three.js / Tailwind CSS
- **Deployment**: VPS + Caddy + PM2
- **Monetization**: Free-to-play. Non-personalized ads may appear.
- **Analytics**: Plausible (self-hosted, privacy-friendly, no personal data)

## Independence
Trading Tazos Game is an independent fictional game. Minimon, Cybermon, and Dracobell are original fictional collection labels. TTG is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or connected to any third-party toy, anime, game or collectible brand.
